flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Colorado School of Mines rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.5k → $21.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Colorado School of Mines rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.8k → $45.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Colorado School of Mines fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Colorado School of Mines are 82% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($97.3k vs $53.4k).
